name: Cannoli Cream Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix confectioners' sugar, ricotta cheese, and candied fruit in a bowl until well combined.
3. Stir in vanilla extract and semisweet chocolate chips until evenly distributed.
4. Transfer mixture into dessert pizza shells.
5. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
6. Allow to cool completely before serving.
